subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down by the Sovereign of the Kingdom of Names unto the people of creation. Blessed is he who hearkeneth and respondeth, and woe betide every heedless one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک ملکوت الاسماء لاهل الانشاء طوبی لمن سمع و اجاب و ویل لکل غافل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action
